induced_prompt_raw: Generate a sentence with four nested relative clauses using the subject-extraction pattern: "the [Noun1] the [Noun2] the [Noun3] the [Noun4] [Verb4] [Verb3] [Verb2] [Verb1]" (where the verbs resolve the nested dependencies in reverse order, ending with an intransitive verb).
